universeInfo.label: 25 equity portfolios + Treasuries (+ cash)
universeInfo.description: Twenty-five equity portfolios, plus U.S. Treasuries at 2Y/5Y/10Y. Dynamic strategies may also leave residual wealth in cash, so the effective investable set includes a cash sleeve.

specInfo.shortLabel: PLS · (portfolio returns + FF5 factors + macro/curve inputs) · H1 · k=2
specInfo.description: PLS-based factor-zoo candidate; with horizon H=1; and k=2 latent components; using portfolio returns, FF5 factors, macro/curve inputs.
